rationale: Art. VIII §4 prohibits surrendering power to tax corporations and corporate property. A homestead exemption for individual residences under Tax Code §11.13(b) is unrelated to corporate taxation.
quote: The power to tax corporations and corporate property shall not be surrendered or suspended by act of the Legislature, by any contract or grant to which the State shall be a party.
_note: No conflict; art. VIII §4 addresses corporate taxation power, not individual homestead exemptions.
